title: erysimum subhastatum
intro: Erysimum subhastatum, also known as Fringed Wallflower or Western Wallflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erysimum subhastatum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
